inputs.label: Daily Calorie Intake
inputs.businessContext: Total daily energy intake target in kilocalories.

inputs.label: Protein %
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of calories from protein. Must sum to 100 with other macros.

inputs.label: Carbohydrates %
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of calories from carbohydrates. Must sum to 100 with other macros.

inputs.label: Fat %
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of calories from fat. Must sum to 100 with other macros.
